metadata.description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, and formal closeout.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow skill pack: 24 hf-* skills covering discovery -> spec -> design -> tasks -> TDD -> reviews -> gates -> finalize -> verify (hf-browser-testing, v0.2.0) -> release (hf-release, v0.4.0), with evidence-based routing. v0.3.0 adds Cursor as the third officially-supported client (Claude Code + OpenCode + Cursor); v0.4.0 introduces hf-release as a standalone release-tier skill decoupled from the router (engineer-level release; deployment / staged rollout / monitoring / rollback remain v0.6+ planned hf-shipping-and-launch). v0.5.0 adds a closeout HTML companion report to hf-finalize: every closeout now also produces features/<active>/closeout.html alongside closeout.md, rendered by the new stdlib-only skills/hf-finalize/scripts/render-closeout-html.py (skill-owned tool per ADR-005 D10) with hf-ui-design / anti-slop discipline (workflow timeline rail + tests + coverage rings + searchable evidence matrix + WCAG 2.2 AA + dark/light + printable). hf-finalize is the only modified skill in v0.5.0; skill set stays at 24 hf-* + using-hf-workflow; slash commands stay at 7.
